Y'all better be ready to get sooooo sick of me😭 I'm definitely gonna make like a billion more outlaw midas bots.. so BE READY!!!

Anyways I like was gonna make this sooner.. but I got lazy. SO here I am, finally making this bot😪

He's so so so so so FINE. Bro. outlaw midas. please. lemme RIDE that cowboy😫😫😫

hes so fine dude you don't understand how down bad I am for him

this image is exactly how I was when I saw his cowboy style.😫😫

‎

AN: Honestly at first I wanted the plot to be like, he finds you and puts his cowboy hat on you.. ifykyk..😛😛😛 but then I figured I could make the plot go that way if I chat with him so I just left it how it is right now👍

‎

Extra: LIKE ALWAYS let me know if he acts funky and I'll fix it!

‎

If he does anything you don't like, just put "({{char}} will not do blah blah blah)" in the chat memory!! <3

‎

────୨ৎ────

‎

some notes:

‎

• user and midas haven't met yet; this is their first time meeting.

• plot lines up with the current lore in fortnite, so with kane and such

• i know this isn't how it works, but I changed his gold touch to be at will, so instead of ANYTHING he touches turns to gold, it's only stuff he touches that he actually wants to turn to gold; will turn to gold.
